entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A tropical grain legume (Cajanus cajan) important for food and nutritional security in developing countries

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A region where pigeonpea is important for food and nutritional security

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region where pigeonpea is important for food and nutritional security

entities.name: TROPICAL AMERICAS
entities.description: A region where pigeonpea is important for food and nutritional security

entities.name: WHOLE-GENOME RESEQUENCING
entities.description: A technique used on 292 Cajanus accessions to characterize genome-wide variation

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE VARIATION
entities.description: The variation across the genome characterized using whole-genome resequencing

entities.name: SCAN FOR SELECTIVE SWEEPS
entities.description: A method used to find genomic regions that were likely targets of domestication and breeding

entities.name: DOMESTICATION
entities.description: The process of adapting wild plants for human use, identified via selective sweep scans

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of improving plant traits, identified via selective sweep scans

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to identify associations between candidate genes and agronomically important traits

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: Genes identified through association analysis that are linked to agronomically important traits

entities.name: AGRONOMICALLY IMPORTANT TRAITS
entities.description: Traits of interest in pigeonpea identified through genome-wide association analysis

entities.name: FLOWERING TIME CONTROL
entities.description: A specific agronomic trait related to the timing of flowering

entities.name: SEED DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: A specific agronomic trait related to how seeds develop

entities.name: POD DEHISCENCE
entities.description: A specific agronomic trait related to the opening of pods

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: A key trait for improvement to ensure sustainability in pigeonpea

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The goal of improving pigeonpea through genetic gains in key traits
